title: Merge .tix projects
mapHelpMatrix: Each chip is a source class. Move them from pending to the cell of the canonical class they belong to. Nothing is lost without an explicit discard.
autofillHelp: Assign pending classes to canonicals by exact name match
autofillFuzzyHelp: Assign pending classes to canonicals by name similarity (≥ 0.85)
removeCanonical: Remove canonical (its chips go back to pending)
pendingBlockHint: You cannot merge while there are pending classes. Assign them or discard them explicitly from the chip menu.

error.mixedTypes: Projects have different types. Only same-type merge is supported.
error.noCanonical: There must be at least one canonical class.
error.pending: There are unassigned classes. Assign them to a canonical or explicitly discard them.
